initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT SUM(cr.points) AS total_points, c.name, c.nationality
FROM races r
JOIN constructorResults cr ON r.raceId = cr.raceId
JOIN constructors c ON cr.constructorId = c.constructorId
WHERE r.name = 'Monaco Grand Prix'
  AND r.year >= 1980
  AND r.year <= 2010
GROUP BY c.constructorId, c.name, c.nationality
ORDER BY total_points DESC
LIMIT 1;

aggregation.selected_sql:
SELECT SUM(cr.points) AS total_points, c.name, c.nationality
FROM races r
JOIN constructorResults cr ON r.raceId = cr.raceId
JOIN constructors c ON cr.constructorId = c.constructorId
WHERE r.name = 'Monaco Grand Prix'
  AND r.year >= 1980
  AND r.year <= 2010
